design_plan: Python RNG Execution: seed(meta-display-ai-assistant|use_case|wearable-evaluators|2026-07-06T15:44:11Z)-> architecture=workflow-command-center, font=Cabinet Grotesk, components=[workflow-playbook-timeline, gapless-bento-grid, source-card-dossier], gsap=[pinned-chapter-scroll, hover-physics]. AIDA Check: Attention(hero cinematic), Interest(market proof + sources), Desire(workflow + cache), Action(CTA band). Font Selection: Cabinet Grotesk only. Hero Math Verification: clamp(44px–72px), max-width 1120px => 2–3 lines. Bento Density Verification: grid-auto-flow:dense present. GSAP Motion Selection: guarded CDN, motion-safe fallbacks. Label Sweep & Button Check: black pill primary, white secondary, contrast verified.
headline: Meta Display AI assistant for real-world computer actions

site_brief.audience: people evaluating AI assistants for Meta smart glasses and display-style wearable workflows
site_brief.goal: Create an indexable SEO use-case page in the /use-cases/ cluster. Target the practical query 'Meta Display AI assistant', show the exact job-to-be-done, and explain how Super can perform the workflow with real computer use and a reusable computer-use cache. Include sibling use-case links so the cluster feels intentional, crawlable, and useful. Add a long-form operator playbook with how-to steps, setup checklist, realistic limits, confirmation moments, and examples that a reader can act on immediately.
site_brief.title: Meta Display AI assistant
site_brief.use_case_intent: show how Super can become the action layer for hands-free Meta Display workflows beyond simple voice answers

summary: A practical, operator-grade field guide to using Super as a Meta Display AI assistant—moving beyond voice answers to durable, repeatable computer-use workflows powered by a reusable computer-use cache.
